content.en:
"I haven't been to many Eternal Realm Alliances in the Eternal Realm Realm, so if I look for them slowly in the future, there is a high probability that I can find a few Eternal Demon Pillars, and it shouldn't be a big problem!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

So, in the following days, he continued to search for the Eternal Pillar.

However, it is too much luck to find the Eternal Demon Pillar, and some of the Eternal Realm Alliances also have the Eternal Realm God Realm guarding them, so Ye Tian's behavior naturally has to be carried out secretly, so it often takes a little time to sneak in, so the exploration speed is a little slower.

However, as long as it takes more time, you will be able to explore all the Demon Seed Abyss.

The years passed.

In a trance, more than 3 billion years of the Dao Era have passed.

Endless Realms Alliance.

In the place where Ye Tian was retreating, he was improving his Eternal Dao Seed, and inside his Eternal Dao Seed there was a Chilin spear and five Eternal Demon Pillars.

These five Eternal Demon Pillars were all his gains, and he had almost explored most of the Demon Seed Abyss in the Eternal Realm.

In this way, he can obtain the five Eternal Pillars.

Now, under the tempering of the five Eternal Demon Pillars and one of the 26 Chilin Ancient Spears, his Eternal Dao Rank has improved very quickly.

At this rate, it would take at most six or seven billion Dao Era years for him to be able to raise the Eternal Dao Species to its current limit.

......

this day.

Another good thing is coming.

Imaginary domain.

The place where the Eternal Realm Spirit Tree was cultivated, at this time, this Eternal Realm Spirit Tree had grown to an incomparably large extent, and an Eternal Realm Spirit Fruit was about to fully ripen.

He has been waiting for the birth of this Eternal Realm Spirit Fruit, and the ripening of this Eternal Realm Spirit Fruit also means that the Eternal Realm Spirit Tree has completely recovered and will give birth to Eternal Realm Spirit Fruits one after another in the future.

Of course.

According to the growth law of the Eternal Realm Spirit Tree, if an Eternal Realm Spirit Fruit wants to be born and conceived, it will take at least ten trillion years to the Dao Era, and during this period, a large amount of resources must be provided for the growth of the Eternal Realm Spirit Tree.

However, if he continued to water the Eternal Realm Spirit Tree with the power of the Eternal Dao Seed, then he could reduce the cultivation time by most of it, and at most tens of billions of Dao Era years could cultivate an Eternal Realm Spirit Fruit.

After another period of time, the Eternal Realm Spirit Fruit was finally cultivated.

Airplanes!!!!

The Eternal Realm Spirit Fruit was conceived, exuding a strange fragrance, and this fragrance permeated out, covering a huge territory.

But this is the Void Domain, so naturally it will not attract strong people.

Soon.

Ye Tian picked this Eternal Realm Spirit Fruit and kept it.

"When the Eternal Dao Seed breaks through to the limit, you can use this Eternal Realm Spirit Fruit to break through!"

Ye Tian muttered.

It's not that he can't rely on himself to break through, but he still has to try the effect of the Eternal Realm Spirit Fruit, and with the help of the Eternal Realm Spirit Fruit, he will directly get through the weak period, and the success rate is 100%.

And if you rely on yourself and condense the second Eternal Realm Spirit, the success rate will no longer be 100%.

As for him, his family was still far from impacting the first Eternal Realm Spirit.

The main reason is that his family members are too slow to refine the Eternal Demon Pillar, and they can't refine the Eternal Demon Pillar as quickly as he can.

He could sacrifice the Eternal Dao Seed and use the power of the Crazy Burning Eternal Dao Seed to refine the Eternal Demon Pillar, but his relatives had no way to do so, so they could only choose the normal mode to refine, which was naturally very slow.

You only need to refine once, and you don't need to continue refining later, and you can always cultivate with the help of the Eternal Demon Pillar.

Now, they have only recently succeeded in refining.

Ye Tian estimated that his wife and children would probably need ten billion Eternal Dao Realms before they could raise the Eternal Dao Species to their current limit.

At that time, he had already broken through again and condensed the second Eternal Realm Spirit.

......

this day.

Ye Tian had finally raised the Eternal Dao Seed to its current limit, to the point where it could no longer be further improved.

At this time, he had to condense the second Eternal Realm Spirit before he could complete the breakthrough.

Thereupon.

He took out the Eternal Realm Spirit Fruit, and then used the Tianyan Ancient Peng Technique to break through.

In this way, his success rate is 100 percent, and there is no possibility of mistakes.

"Let's go!"

Ye Tian swallowed the Eternal Realm Spirit Fruit in one gulp, and then ran the Tianyan Ancient Peng Technique to condense the perfect-level Eternal Realm Spirit, the Tianyan Ancient Peng Realm Spirit.

Rumble!!!!

His Eternal Dao Seed power continued to condense Tianyan Gu Peng, and the origin of the Eternal Dao Seed was constantly consumed, but the Eternal Realm Spirit Fruit was making up for the origin of the Eternal Dao Seed and accelerating the condensation of the Tianyan Gu Peng Realm Spirit.

In this way, it became extremely easy for him to condense the Heavenly Yan Gu Peng Realm Spirit.

After a period of time, the Tianyan Gu Peng Realm Spirit was successfully condensed, and he didn't feel weak at all, and the Eternal Dao Seed grew a lot.

It was at this time that his Eternal Realm Spiritual Technique awakened.

【Tianyan Pengguang Technique】

This Eternal Realm Spirit Technique is a speed class, which can make Ye Tian's speed extremely terrifying.

It can be said that his speed has increased more than tenfold.

In this way, his real 233 power naturally increased substantially.

"It's worthy of a perfect-level Eternal Realm Spiritual Technique, and now I already have two Perfect-level Eternal Realm Spiritual Techniques!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

He felt that his current strength was not as good as that of an Eternal Realm God Realm mid-level existence, but it was estimated that it was about the same.

It's just that he hasn't fought against the middle level of the Eternal Realm God Realm, and he hasn't even seen it, so naturally he can't estimate the strength of the middle level of the Eternal Realm God Realm.

"Go to the sixth level of the Xuanxing Holy Gate to take a look, the sixth level should be the middle-level powerhouse of the Eternal Realm God Realm that condenses the four Eternal Realm spirits, and if you fight with them, you will know what the strength of the Eternal Realm God Realm mid-level is. "

Thereupon.

Ye Tian's copy body left in the inheritance land of the Xuanxing Holy Gate, he used the Xuanxing Eternal Rod, and entered the inheritance land again for the sixth round of assessment.

Airplanes!

Ye Tian entered the sixth round of assessment, and then one figure after another appeared, all of them were powerhouses comparable to the middle level of the Eternal Realm God Realm.

Bang!!!!

The battle is on!

And it didn't take long for Ye Tian to lose, but it was only a pity, it was defeated by the siege of the other party, not the gap in his own strength.

He estimated that his strength was no less than that of the middle-level powerhouses of the Eternal Realm God Realm, and if he improved his strength a little more, he should have the hope of breaking through the middle-level powerhouses of the Eternal Realm God Realm!.
